content_body: Thank you so much for this wonderful place and experience.  It was altogether very special for our family.  We enjoyed breathing in the tranquil beauty and majestic mountaintop views.  We relished every moment.  It was refreshing for the mind and soul.  It was peaceful, prayerful, adventurous, magical, and unforgettable. The love and work you both put into it was felt, and it left us feeling like it was our home for the time we were here.  It is a memory and experience that our family will cherish forever.  A big thank you and even bigger hug from the Cueto Family.
title: A Magical Time at Serendipity
